reviews.comment:
Trabajan rapido. Buena atención de los playeros. No tuve buena experiencia llevando a arreglar el auto al taller del complejo. No revisaron el motor expresando que al ir hasta allí había calentado el motor y para revisarlo debía estar frio. Esto es 8 hs sin funcionar. Imposible de concretar porque entonces no podría llegar

(Translated by Google)
They work quickly. The attendants are good. I didn't have a good experience taking my car to the complex's workshop for repairs. They didn't check the engine, saying that it had warmed up on the way there and needed to be cold for inspection. This means my car was out of commission for 8 hours. It's impossible to get it fixed because then I wouldn't be able to get there.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3465762675351672611/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURHbF9LWFFREAE
